programs.name: Strength & Resilience Block
programs.description: 10-week progressive strength block following plantar fascia recovery. Builds from dumbbell fundamentals to barbell front squat, with systematic load increases every 2 sessions.

program_json.summary: A 10-week strength building program for Priya designed to safely progress from her post-plantar fasciitis baseline to barbell lifting. Weeks 1–4 establish machine and dumbbell foundations, Weeks 5–8 introduce barbell work, and Weeks 9–10 consolidate new strength levels with barbell front and back squat.

weeks.theme: Foundation — establish base loads and movement quality

sessions.label: Week 1 Day A
sessions.focus: Full-body baseline — reinforce plantar fascia-safe patterns

sessions.label: Week 1 Day B
sessions.focus: Hip hinge and pulling volume — establish biweekly rhythm

weeks.theme: Volume Build — add reps and set density

sessions.label: Week 2 Day A
sessions.focus: Goblet squat progression + cable row volume

sessions.label: Week 2 Day B
sessions.focus: Push-pull superset — overhead and horizontal emphasis

sessions.label: Week 3 Day A
sessions.focus: Progressive overload — increase lower body and pull loads

sessions.label: Week 3 Day B
sessions.focus: Romanian deadlift introduction and upper push

weeks.theme: Strength Focus — push barbell front squat

sessions.label: Week 4 Day A
sessions.focus: Strength block — barbell front squat first session

sessions.label: Week 4 Day B
sessions.focus: Upper body peak — cable row PR and push press load

weeks.theme: New Load PRs — goblet and cable benchmarks

sessions.label: Week 5 Day A
sessions.focus: New year push — all loads at new working maxes

sessions.label: Week 5 Day B
sessions.focus: Upper-lower split — consolidate biweekly strength

sessions.label: Week 6 Day A
sessions.focus: Full-body strength — goblet squat to 40 lbs

sessions.label: Week 6 Day B
sessions.focus: Barbell front squat progression to 60 lbs

weeks.theme: Progressive Peak — barbell work and cable strength

sessions.label: Week 7 Day A
sessions.focus: Strength progression — cable row 60 lbs

sessions.label: Week 7 Day B
sessions.focus: Barbell front squat 65 lbs + goblet squat 45 lbs PR

weeks.theme: Volume Maintenance — sustain load, increase density

sessions.label: Week 8 Day A
sessions.focus: Volume push — upper body and hip hinge density

sessions.label: Week 8 Day B
sessions.focus: Barbell front squat 70 lbs — new working max

weeks.theme: Strength Peak — barbell back squat introduction

sessions.label: Week 9 Day A
sessions.focus: Introduce barbell back squat — light load pattern

sessions.label: Week 9 Day B
sessions.focus: Cable row PR attempt at 65 lbs

weeks.theme: Consolidation — assess and set next block targets

sessions.label: Week 10 Day A
sessions.focus: Barbell back squat progressive load — 75 lbs × 5

sessions.label: Week 10 Day B
sessions.focus: Full-body strength consolidation — block complete
